title: EmailSum: Abstractive Email Thread Summarization
body: Factual Consistency Evaluation for Text Summarization via Counterfactual Estimation.Furthermore, we find that widely used automatic evaluation metrics (ROUGE, BERTScore) are weakly correlated with human judgments on this email thread summarization task.
